form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran last in a small field at this track on February 28 over 1308m, 12 len behind Juba's Parade carrying 53kg at $5.90. Second-up 3rd of 7 at this track on March 19 over 905m, 4 len behind Double Airo with 53kg at $18.20. Can't make much of a case.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 3 len at this track March 21 over 905m defeating Priority One with 53.5kg at $5.90.
